short.es: Hito histórico: primer álbum de una banda de metal/rock en debutar en el #1 del Billboard 200.
short.en: Historic milestone: first metal/rock band album to debut at #1 on the Billboard 200.

extended.es: Skeletá marca el pico comercial de la carrera de Ghost. Producido bajo el seudónimo Gene Walker —alias de Tobias Forge—, el álbum presenta un sonido más oscuro y etéreo que sus predecesores, con capas atmosféricas y una producción envolvente que profundiza la mitología de la banda. Su debut en el #1 del Billboard 200 convirtió a Ghost en la primera banda de metal/rock en encabezar ese chart en la era moderna, demostrando que el camino desde las catacumbas suecas hasta la cima de la industria musical fue tan inevitable como la sucesión de sus papados.
extended.en: Skeletá marks the commercial peak of Ghost's career. Produced under the pseudonym Gene Walker —Tobias Forge's alias— the album presents a darker and more ethereal sound than its predecessors, with atmospheric layers and enveloping production that deepens the band's mythology. Its debut at #1 on the Billboard 200 made Ghost the first metal/rock band to top that chart in the modern era, proving that the road from Swedish catacombs to the top of the music industry was as inevitable as the succession of its papacies.

short.es: #1 en cuatro países. La era imperial de Ghost, potenciada por el fenómeno viral de Mary on a Cross.
short.en: #1 in four countries. Ghost's imperial era, fueled by the Mary on a Cross viral phenomenon.

extended.es: Lanzado en marzo de 2022, Impera es el quinto álbum de estudio de Ghost y el más ambicioso hasta ese momento. Producido por Klas Åhlund —que regresó al redil tras Meliora— con co-producción de Vargas & Lagola en algunas pistas, el álbum explora la caída de los grandes imperios a lo largo de la historia como metáfora de los ciclos del poder humano. Impera debutó en el #1 en Suecia, Noruega, Finlandia e incluyó el himno "Hunter's Moon" de la banda sonora de Halloween Kills. Para entonces, el fenómeno viral de "Mary on a Cross" en TikTok —impulsado por la serie Wednesday de Netflix— había multiplicado el público de Ghost exponencialmente, haciendo de la gira de Impera la más grande de su historia.
extended.en: Released in March 2022, Impera is Ghost's fifth studio album and their most ambitious to that point. Produced by Klas Åhlund —who returned after Meliora— with co-production by Vargas & Lagola on select tracks, the album explores the fall of great empires throughout history as a metaphor for human power cycles. Impera debuted at #1 in Sweden, Norway and Finland and included the anthem "Hunter's Moon" from the Halloween Kills soundtrack. By then, the viral phenomenon of "Mary on a Cross" on TikTok —driven by Netflix's Wednesday series— had multiplied Ghost's audience exponentially, making the Impera tour the biggest in their history.

tracks.lyrics:
We are here in the after
Of a murderous crafter
The past...
Is spun like a yarn and mangled
With flesh and blood and bones
I wonder
Did no one hear the distant thunder?

The autumnal reaper
The stains of this creeper
...Will last
The shine and the sham entangled
Like salting earth with tears of Jesus
He sliced and diced our dreams to pieces

For the dreams that you dread
Can becomе just as real
As the blood that was shed
With thе slash of his steel

Now the street walking dead
Was quite a scene, wasn't it?
For the lost and mislead
Were promised seats by the pit

We will break away together
I will be the shadow
You will be the light
Nothing ever lasts forever
We will go softly into the night

We are leaving this city
So this is farewell
Goodbye Seven Sisters
And Saint Jezebel

The moon in the gutter
Has a story to tell
One day he will come back
From the bowels of hell

He appeared to ascend
So we all stood there in awe
Now we have to pretend
We did not see what we saw

When the curtain unveiled
To the sound of applause
For the king that we hailed
Was the Wizard of Oz

We will break away together
I will be the shadow
You will be the light
Nothing ever lasts forever
We will go softly into the night

Nothing ever lasts forever
We will go softly into the night

short.es: La era de la Peste Negra: Rats y Dance Macabre llevaron a Ghost al mainstream global.
short.en: The Black Death era: Rats and Dance Macabre took Ghost to the global mainstream.

extended.es: Prequelle, lanzado en junio de 2018, fue el salto definitivo de Ghost al mainstream. Producido por Tom Dalgety, el álbum toma la Peste Negra medieval como telón de fondo para explorar la inevitabilidad de la muerte y la fugacidad de la vida. "Rats" —con su riff de guitarra inconfundible— se convirtió en el segundo single de Ghost en alcanzar el #1 en la radio rock de EE.UU., y "Dance Macabre" demostró sin complejos que Ghost podía escribir pop puro de los años 80. El álbum fue nominado al Grammy al Mejor Álbum de Metal. La era Prequelle también presentó a Cardinal Copia, el personaje más carismático y humanamente cómico de la saga, quien completaría su arco narrativo al ser coronado Papa Emeritus IV al final de la gira.
extended.en: Prequelle, released in June 2018, was Ghost's definitive leap into the mainstream. Produced by Tom Dalgety, the album takes the medieval Black Death as a backdrop to explore the inevitability of death and the transience of life. "Rats" —with its unmistakable guitar riff— became Ghost's second single to reach #1 on US rock radio, and "Dance Macabre" unapologetically proved that Ghost could write pure 80s pop. The album was nominated for the Grammy for Best Metal Album. The Prequelle era also introduced Cardinal Copia, the saga's most charismatic and humanly comical character, who would complete his narrative arc by being crowned Papa Emeritus IV at the end of the tour.

tracks.title: Ashes
tracks.lyrics:
Ring a ring of roses,
a pocket full of posies.
Atishoo, atishoo,
we all fall down.

Ashes on the water,
ashes in the sea,
ashes on the riverside.

One, two, three...

tracks.title: Rats
tracks.lyrics:
In times of turmoil,
in times like these.
Belief is contagious,
spreading disease.

This wretched mischief is now
coursing through your souls.
Never to let go,
never to let go.

Rats!

Into your sanctum
you let them in.
Now all your loved ones
and all your kin.

Will suffer punishments
beneath the wrath of God.
Never to forgive,
never to forget.

Rats...

This devastation left
your cities to be burnt.
Never to return,
never to return.

And filthy rodents are
still coming for your souls.
Never to let go,
never to let go.

Rats...

They're still coming after you,
and there's nothing you can do.
They're still coming after you,
and there's nothing you can do.

Rats...

tracks.title: Faith
tracks.lyrics:
There is a scourge

a perpetrator with a quill.

Although it's often
steeped in well spun mystery,
the accuser sends the bill.

I am all eyes,
I am all ears,
I am the wall,
and I'm watching you fall!.

Because faith is mine!

The Luddites
shun the diabolical,
a fecal trail across the land.

Although it stinks,
feels, and looks identical,
a pack of fools can take the stand.

I am all eyes,
I am all ears,
I am the wall,
and I'm watching you fall!.

Because faith is mine!

Every day that you
feed me with hate

Every day that you
feed me with hate

Drink me, eat me,

Drink me, eat me,

Many a mind I have haunted,

Often the one to have flaunted,

But of all these

Every day that you

tracks.title: Witch Image
tracks.lyrics:
You Have never stood this
close to where you want to be.
You have always waded in the shallows
between me and the deep blue sea.

You'd never want me to appear,
you never want this to be over.
You never want it to reach out
to the edge of time.

While you sleep in earthly delight

Like no other to you,
what you've done you cannot undo.

I have always kept you

I am riding in the shadows
behind you on a pale white horse.

You'd never want me to appear,

Someone's flesh is rotting tonight.
Like no other to you,
what you've done you cannot undo.

While you sleep in earthly delight,
still your soul will suffer this plight.
Like your father in Hell,
what you've sold you cannot unsell.

While you sleep in earthly delight
someone's flesh is rotting tonight.
Like no other to you,
what you've done you cannot undo.

While you sleep in earthly delight,

But like a mother would save

short.es: La obra maestra. Cirice ganó el Grammy al Mejor Performance de Metal en 2016.
short.en: The masterpiece. Cirice won the Grammy for Best Metal Performance in 2016.

extended.es: Meliora —latín para 'mejor'— es considerado por fans y crítica como la obra cumbre de Ghost. Producido por Klas Åhlund junto a Tobias Forge, el álbum fue lanzado en agosto de 2015 y debutó en el #1 en Suecia, con posiciones destacadas en varios países europeos. Su single "Cirice" —una canción sobre la soledad y la pertenencia, con un riff poderoso y un coro catártico— ganó el Grammy al Mejor Performance de Metal en febrero de 2016, convirtiendo a Ghost en la primera banda sueca en ganar un Grammy en esa categoría. Meliora es el equilibrio perfecto entre la oscuridad ritual de los primeros años y la accesibilidad melódica que definiría el futuro de la banda.
extended.en: Meliora —Latin for 'better'— is considered by fans and critics as Ghost's crowning achievement. Produced by Klas Åhlund alongside Tobias Forge, the album was released in August 2015 and debuted at #1 in Sweden, with strong positions in several European countries. Its single "Cirice" —a song about loneliness and belonging, with a powerful riff and cathartic chorus— won the Grammy for Best Metal Performance in February 2016, making Ghost the first Swedish band to win a Grammy in that category. Meliora is the perfect balance between the ritual darkness of the early years and the melodic accessibility that would define the band's future.

short.es: Primer #1 en Suecia. El gran salto a un sello major con Year Zero y su coro de 32 voces.
short.en: First #1 in Sweden. The big leap to a major label featuring Year Zero and its 32-voice choir.

extended.es: Infestissumam —latín para 'muy hostil'— fue el primer álbum de Ghost en un sello major (Loma Vista/Republic Records/Universal) y marcó un salto cualitativo en producción y ambición. Producido por Nick Raskulinecz y lanzado en abril de 2013, el álbum alcanzó el #1 en Suecia y demostró que Ghost podía escalar sin perder su identidad. Su track más épico, "Year Zero", requirió un coro de 32 voces para su interpretación. Ese mismo año, Ghost lanzó el EP de versiones "If You Have Ghost", producido por Dave Grohl (Foo Fighters), que incluyó covers de ABBA, Roky Erickson y Army of Lovers. En los Grammys de 2014, la banda fue nominada por su trabajo en este álbum, comenzando una relación con la academia que culminaría con su victoria en 2016.
extended.en: Infestissumam —Latin for 'most hostile'— was Ghost's first album on a major label (Loma Vista/Republic Records/Universal) and marked a qualitative leap in production and ambition. Produced by Nick Raskulinecz and released in April 2013, the album reached #1 in Sweden and proved that Ghost could scale without losing their identity. Their most epic track, "Year Zero", required a 32-voice choir for its recording. That same year, Ghost released the covers EP "If You Have Ghost", produced by Dave Grohl (Foo Fighters), which included covers of ABBA, Roky Erickson and Army of Lovers. At the 2014 Grammys, the band was nominated for their work on this album, beginning a relationship with the academy that would culminate in their 2016 victory.

short.es: El debut que sacudió el metal. Ocho canciones que fundaron una mitología.
short.en: The debut that shook metal. Eight songs that founded a mythology.

extended.es: Opus Eponymous fue el debut de Ghost y uno de los debuts más impactantes del metal del siglo XXI. Antes del álbum, la banda autoeditó el single de 7 pulgadas "Elizabeth" en 2010, que llamó la atención de Lee Dorrian (Cathedral) y su sello Rise Above Records. Producido bajo el seudónimo Gene Walker —alias de Tobias Forge—, el álbum mezclaba el heavy metal de los años 70 (Black Sabbath, Blue Öyster Cult), el rock progresivo y letras explícitamente satánicas con una producción limpia y melodías irresistibles. Ghost apareció en escena de forma anónima y teatral, con un frontman vestido de papa y cara de calavera rodeado de músicos enmascarados. La respuesta del underground fue inmediata: Opus Eponymous fue aclamado como uno de los mejores debuts de la década, y llevó a Ghost a tocar en el festival Roadburn y a girar por toda Europa.
extended.en: Opus Eponymous was Ghost's debut and one of the most impactful metal debuts of the 21st century. Before the album, the band self-released the 7-inch single "Elizabeth" in 2010, which caught the attention of Lee Dorrian (Cathedral) and his Rise Above Records label. Produced under the pseudonym Gene Walker —Tobias Forge's alias— the album blended 70s heavy metal (Black Sabbath, Blue Öyster Cult), progressive rock and explicitly satanic lyrics with clean production and irresistible melodies. Ghost appeared on the scene anonymously and theatrically, with a pope-dressed skull-faced frontman surrounded by masked musicians. The underground response was immediate: Opus Eponymous was acclaimed as one of the best debuts of the decade, leading Ghost to perform at the Roadburn festival and tour throughout Europe.
